S.FORM: Republic of the Congo u Republic of the Congo sa i labu nu Feico, itiza i 1 00 S, 15 00 E u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 342,000 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 341,500 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 500 km2 hamin nu tademaw sa 4,852,412. kakalukan umah sa 31.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 65.60%, zumaay henay umah sa 3.30% tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Brazzaville . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 15 bulad 8 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Denis Sassou Nguesso, micakat a demiad sa i 1997 a mihca 10 bulad 25 demiad. u cunli nu Congo kapulungan a kanatal ayza sa ci Anatole Collinet Makosso, micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihcaan 5 bulad 12 demiad. Democratic Republic of the Congo , France (Fa-kuw ś≥ēŚúč) a kamu, R√©publique d√©mocratique du Congo, miwada tu nisulitan,"RDC",i tini i Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) i tepan nu kanatal, u kamu tu Min-cu-kang-kow han, Congo ('kim)(Congo-Kinshasa)han, tukus nu lala' kaahebal pakala tu 234.5 a mang km2, sakatusa tabakiay uynu dada' i Algeria (A-rl-ci-li-ya ťėŅÁąĺŚŹäŚą©šļě) atu kitakit tu saka sabaw cacay a tabakiay a kanatal, u tademaw malabas tu 8,700 a mangaan i kitakit a tademaw saka sabaw enem ka katuud, Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) a tademaw saka sepat nu katuuday a kanatal, satusa i kitakiday a tademaw saktuuday nu Fa-yu-kow-cia a kamu nu kanatal, kahenulan a tuse u Kinshasa (Cin-sia-sa ťáĎŚ§Źś≤ô). (u kamu nu Hulam sa: Democratic Republic of the Congo (ś≥ēŤ™ě:R√©publique d√©mocratique du Congo,Áį°ŚĮęÁāļRDC), (Congo-Kinshasa) . .) nu binawlanay a nisakaku Kang-kow-ze-yu-bang kakuniza a sakaput atu By-su-kang-kow , 1960 a mihcaan enem a bulad tulu bataan a demiad misakaku patizeng tu kanatal, uyni patizeng tu kanatal hasa, atu belaw i saayaway misateket tu uyzaanay u France tungusay nu malecaday tu Congo kapulungan a kanatal , mala u macu' tu nu kanatal a syakay, i tusaay a kanatal a ni pangangan hawsa, pasu kahenulan a tuse, u ngangan pala u kasazuma , namahini a singangan aca tu Congo kapulungan a kanatal Leopoldville (Li-aw-bo-de-wey-lr Śą©Ś•ßś≥ĘŚĺ∑Á∂≠Áąĺ), Congo 'kim (Congo-Kinshasa)han ku ngangan, 1964 a mihcaan pitu a bulad cacay a demiad, pasumat tu ngangan nu kanatal Democratic Republic of the Congo han tu, 1971 a mihcaan cacay bataan a bulad tusa bataan izaw ku pitu a demiad i kala cung-tungan ni Men-bo-tuo u tayzaay micumut a tademaw pasumat han ku ngangan nu kanatal Sa-yi (ś≥ēŤ™ě:Za√Įre) han, 1997 a mihcaan lima a bulad sabaw pitu a demiad ci Luo-lang-ka-pi-la amikeliday tu Cang-kow-cya-fang-min-cu-li-lang-tung-meng micumut mingayaw tu Kinshasa (Cin-sia-sa ťáĎŚ§Źś≤ô) pabaelin tu ni kuwanan Men-bo-tuo , mahiza a panukas tu ngangan nu kanatal Democratic Republic of the Congo katukuh ayza. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: (ś≥ēŤ™ě:Za√Įre),1997ŚĻī5śúą17śó•, .) 1998 a mihcaan malinga'tu tu sakatusa a ngangayaw nu Congo , uynian a kanatal mapelpel tuway, zayhan uynian a ngangayaw macalap ku siwaay nu Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) a kanatal pakala' tu 20 ku sibakudangay nu icelang, namahini pangangan han tu "Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) a ngangayaw i kitakit u kitakitay" a nu mahini i 2003 a mihcaan masasulit tu sakakapah a letek, nika winikalalebu, mahini tu malalid tunian a kanatal i nuwalian a kakitizaan, mipacici' mipenec mikacaw tu tatayna atu zumaay tu kakaydihan nu uzip u kapelpel kahizaan i kitakit u sa talakaway, uynian a ngangayaw, namakay 1998 a mihcaan mapatay ku tademaw tu 540 a mang. ayza nipangangan tu Kang-kow-kung-he-kow"ŚČõśěúŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč"a kakitizaan, ayaw nu waluay a mang a mihcaan izaw tu tademaw nu muengay, i saayaw nu kasumamadan a laylay malingatu tu ku Congo Bantu a tademaw mabulawamin uheni i ayaw nu kasumamadan tu 2000 a mihcaan katukuh ayaw nu kasumamadan tu 500 a mihcaan namakay saetipan nuwamisan mabulaw tayza i masahelingay a kakitizaan, uyniantu a mihcaan pasu nu ayaway mabulaway a mihcaan, katukuh tu pabelin tu micunuday a tademaw, Bantu a tademaw mabilaw mikitay tu i tizaay nuenengay nu By-ke-mi-zen binacadan a tademaw, kuheni u lalangawan papulung pacumut tu ayzaay a Congo nu timulan a kakitizaan, Bantu a tademaw namakay satipan nutipan a Africa a kakitizaan nu Africa , minanam tuway tu sakalu atu numukingnay a sadiket atu mikawaw, nu Congo Bantu a kamu ku angangan a kamu. Min-cu-kang-ko i tepanay nu kanatal satipan nu Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤), teleklal mibaladay nu tepan a nuwamisan, nuwalian matatules tu U-kang-da , Luanda (Lu-an-da ÁõßŚģČťĀĒ),Pu-long-di ,Tan-san-niy-ya , nuamisan nu belaw Nan-su-dan , Cung-fay-cong-he-cow , nusatipan a kenis tuKang-kow-kung-he-kow , nutimulan a kenis u An-ke-la ,San-piy-ya Kang-ko-he a sauwac, namakay nuwalian pasayza satipan malikit i mahamin nu kanatal, nuzuma izaw ku U-pan-ci a sauwac, Lu-a-la-pa a sauwac u kahenulan nu likit nu sauwac, nuwalian a lilis nu kenis namakay amis pasayza i nutimulan izaw ku Ay-bu-te a taku,Ay-de-hua a taku,Ci-u a taku,Tan-kan-i-ke a taku atu Mu-uay-lu a takuan. Democratic Republic of the Congo a kakitizaan i teban nu Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) nu kanatal , i tiza i Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) balicu' nu teleklalan a kakitizaan, tabaki ku lala', tabaki ku lala' aazihan tu aatupan, Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) uyni dada' A-el-ci-li-ya u sakatusa tabakiay a kanatal, mahamin a kanatal pulung nu hekal a lala' 2 344,858 Ping-bang-kung-li nuwamisan a balaw u Cung-bey-kung-he-ko , nuwalian nuamisan atu Nan-su-dan matatules ku lala', nuwalian a balaw u Dung-bey-kung-he-kow masaapilis ku ilabu ku diheb, talulung ku nanaum salungan azihen atu U-kan-da Tan-san-ni-ya Luanda (Lu-an-da ÁõßŚģČťĀĒ) atu pulung-di matatulas, nutimulan atu An-ke-la matatules mababelaw nuwalian nutimulan San-pi-ya , satipan kenis nu Kang-ko , satipan nutimulan i salikit a sauwac Kang-ko-he , i salikit kalimucu' Ta-si-yang , dadipsan 37 Kung-li katanayu' dada'. 2001 a mihcaan cacay a bulad sabaw pitu a demiad, Lo-lang-de-si-lay-ka-pi-la mapatasasa nu saba a sakakaay nu hitay mapacuk mapatay tu ci La-sen-di-mi-ze-le (Rashidi Mizele), u wawa nu Ye-se-fu-ka-la-pi taluma i kanatal mala Cung-tung , mikawaw katukuh i 2019 a mihcaan 1 a bulad 24 a demiad. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 2001ŚĻī1śúą18śó•,śīõśúó-Śĺ∑Ť•Ņťõ∑¬∑ ¬∑ÁĪ≥śĺ§Śčí(Rashidi Mizele)ŚąļśģļŤļęšļ°,ŚÖ∂Ś≠źÁīĄÁĎüŚ§ę¬∑ 2019ŚĻī1śúą24śó•.) 2006 a mihcan 7 abulad 30 a demiad, Congo 'kim mikawaw ku Kung-tung atu Ko-mi-iy-huay amisingkiw, 8 a bulad 20 a demiad, misaketeday misingkiw ku Uay-yuan-huay sakamusa,pasingkiwan tu Kung-tung nayay ku pakaalaay tu 50% kaipapaw a paya, ci Ye-se-fu-ca-pi-la atu Zang-pi-i-rlben-pa misingkiw aca tu sakatusa apisingkiw 10 a bulad 29 a deniad, sakatusa makakutay misingkiw tu a a Kung-tung 11 a bulad 15 a demiad, misatekeday misingkiway a uay-uang sakamusa, ci Ka-pi-rl ku masingkiway a Kung-tung ,12 a bulad 30 a demiad, ci An-tuo-ban-ci-can-cia mala u Cung-li . makay 1980 a mihcaan a tepan nu ciday hausa, Congo a Á§¶ÁĒĘ nulaculan mawada tu, kanahatu i 1960ŚĻī namisateket tulin i Nan-bey hausa Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) a sakatusa ku kikay kusi nu kanatal, nika satabaki satu uyni kasakalamkam a malahat u mikimmay atu miba'tuay atu malukay u niu kange'luan kaizaw, saayaway atu sakatusa pingangayaw nu Congo atu1996ŚĻī mmalinga'tu tu macacukah, tabaki satu kini sakalawacu' nu Congo a tademaw nu kanatal nisangaan a aca atu caysan nu kanatal nu micumuday, a pabelinen ku suku nu kanatal micunus tu ku talakaw, tu ku nu nutawan a kinapinanay tu a ngangayaw, mapatay tu 500 a man kakatuud nu mapatayay a tademaw, malilit tu a makunga'lay atu imelang uynian a kanatal, pakala tu tulu a tusa ku tademaw caay ka kapah ku uzip. ŚČõśěúśįĎšłĽŚÖĪ u malukay a kanatal, malahadÁôľŚĪē tu nikalukan, u lalabu nu kanatal masenged sidamek tu lala' mahini u nikalukan atuud yadah satu, hatu i kakuti'ay paluma', u ngannganan nu nipalumaan u a zung-gu-su a kilang, misangatu zung-gu a simal u kahenulan kuni , uyza satu nipalunaan nu kuhi ke-ke ,sanasay ,kupa ,papah nu katasaku ,tipus ,lami' , padingad , kubkub , tebus , kalitang ,galasu , paza' atu uza amin. tutuc tu 2016 a mihcaanŚĻī pulung nisulitan a tademaw Democratic Republic of the Congo i lalabu nu kanatal pulung izaw ku 254ŚÄč ku ni kasaniyazu' nu binacadan, Bantu a kamu a kamuan musakamuay tuynian a kamu pakala tu pulung 84ÔľÖ ku tademaw, Congo a binacadan, Nen-ciy-la a binacadan , Lu-pa a minacadan , Men-ke-en-ku-en-tu a men-ke-en-du a minacadan , Lung-da a binacadan , Su-ku a binacadan amin, u liwan satu u kamu Su-dan a kamu A-can-de a binacadan atu Ni-lu-de a kamu A-lu-rl a binacadan atu Pa ke-mi a banacadan amin, kamu nu kanatal u Fa a kamu , angangan a kamu izaw ku Lin-ciy-la a kamu Ci-kang-ku a kamu Ci-lu-pa a kamu atu Se-wa-si-li a kamu , u binawlan 55ÔľÖ ku u Tin-si-kiw,35ÔľÖ u baluhay a singku, nu zumaay pulung 10ÔľÖ. S.FORM: Republic of the Congo u Republic of the Congo sa i labu nu Feico, itiza i 1 00 S, 15 00 E u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 342,000 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 341,500 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 500 km2 hamin nu tademaw sa 4,852,412. kakalukan umah sa 31.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 65.60%, zumaay henay umah sa 3.30% tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Brazzaville . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 15 bulad 8 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Denis Sassou Nguesso, micakat a demiad sa i 1997 a mihca 10 bulad 25 demiad. u cunli nu Congo kapulungan a kanatal ayza sa ci Anatole Collinet Makosso, micakat a demiad sa i 2021 a mihcaan 5 bulad 12 demiad. Democratic Republic of the Congo , France (Fa-kuw ś≥ēŚúč) a kamu, R√©publique d√©mocratique du Congo, miwada tu nisulitan,"RDC",i tini i Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) i tepan nu kanatal, u kamu tu Min-cu-kang-kow han, Congo ('kim)(Congo-Kinshasa)han, tukus nu lala' kaahebal pakala tu 234.5 a mang km2, sakatusa tabakiay uynu dada' i Algeria (A-rl-ci-li-ya ťėŅÁąĺŚŹäŚą©šļě) atu kitakit tu saka sabaw cacay a tabakiay a kanatal, u tademaw malabas tu 8,700 a mangaan i kitakit a tademaw saka sabaw enem ka katuud, Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) a tademaw saka sepat nu katuuday a kanatal, satusa i kitakiday a tademaw saktuuday nu Fa-yu-kow-cia a kamu nu kanatal, kahenulan a tuse u Kinshasa (Cin-sia-sa ťáĎŚ§Źś≤ô). (u kamu nu Hulam sa: Democratic Republic of the Congo (ś≥ēŤ™ě:R√©publique d√©mocratique du Congo,Áį°ŚĮęÁāļRDC), (Congo-Kinshasa) . .) nu binawlanay a nisakaku Kang-kow-ze-yu-bang kakuniza a sakaput atu By-su-kang-kow , 1960 a mihcaan enem a bulad tulu bataan a demiad misakaku patizeng tu kanatal, uyni patizeng tu kanatal hasa, atu belaw i saayaway misateket tu uyzaanay u France tungusay nu malecaday tu Congo kapulungan a kanatal , mala u macu' tu nu kanatal a syakay, i tusaay a kanatal a ni pangangan hawsa, pasu kahenulan a tuse, u ngangan pala u kasazuma , namahini a singangan aca tu Congo kapulungan a kanatal Leopoldville (Li-aw-bo-de-wey-lr Śą©Ś•ßś≥ĘŚĺ∑Á∂≠Áąĺ), Congo 'kim (Congo-Kinshasa)han ku ngangan, 1964 a mihcaan pitu a bulad cacay a demiad, pasumat tu ngangan nu kanatal Democratic Republic of the Congo han tu, 1971 a mihcaan cacay bataan a bulad tusa bataan izaw ku pitu a demiad i kala cung-tungan ni Men-bo-tuo u tayzaay micumut a tademaw pasumat han ku ngangan nu kanatal Sa-yi (ś≥ēŤ™ě:Za√Įre) han, 1997 a mihcaan lima a bulad sabaw pitu a demiad ci Luo-lang-ka-pi-la amikeliday tu Cang-kow-cya-fang-min-cu-li-lang-tung-meng micumut mingayaw tu Kinshasa (Cin-sia-sa ťáĎŚ§Źś≤ô) pabaelin tu ni kuwanan Men-bo-tuo , mahiza a panukas tu ngangan nu kanatal Democratic Republic of the Congo katukuh ayza. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: (ś≥ēŤ™ě:Za√Įre),1997ŚĻī5śúą17śó•, .) 1998 a mihcaan malinga'tu tu sakatusa a ngangayaw nu Congo , uynian a kanatal mapelpel tuway, zayhan uynian a ngangayaw macalap ku siwaay nu Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) a kanatal pakala' tu 20 ku sibakudangay nu icelang, namahini pangangan han tu "Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) a ngangayaw i kitakit u kitakitay" a nu mahini i 2003 a mihcaan masasulit tu sakakapah a letek, nika winikalalebu, mahini tu malalid tunian a kanatal i nuwalian a kakitizaan, mipacici' mipenec mikacaw tu tatayna atu zumaay tu kakaydihan nu uzip u kapelpel kahizaan i kitakit u sa talakaway, uynian a ngangayaw, namakay 1998 a mihcaan mapatay ku tademaw tu 540 a mang. ayza nipangangan tu Kang-kow-kung-he-kow"ŚČõśěúŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč"a kakitizaan, ayaw nu waluay a mang a mihcaan izaw tu tademaw nu muengay, i saayaw nu kasumamadan a laylay malingatu tu ku Congo Bantu a tademaw mabulawamin uheni i ayaw nu kasumamadan tu 2000 a mihcaan katukuh ayaw nu kasumamadan tu 500 a mihcaan namakay saetipan nuwamisan mabulaw tayza i masahelingay a kakitizaan, uyniantu a mihcaan pasu nu ayaway mabulaway a mihcaan, katukuh tu pabelin tu micunuday a tademaw, Bantu a tademaw mabilaw mikitay tu i tizaay nuenengay nu By-ke-mi-zen binacadan a tademaw, kuheni u lalangawan papulung pacumut tu ayzaay a Congo nu timulan a kakitizaan, Bantu a tademaw namakay satipan nutipan a Africa a kakitizaan nu Africa , minanam tuway tu sakalu atu numukingnay a sadiket atu mikawaw, nu Congo Bantu a kamu ku angangan a kamu. Min-cu-kang-ko i tepanay nu kanatal satipan nu Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤), teleklal mibaladay nu tepan a nuwamisan, nuwalian matatules tu U-kang-da , Luanda (Lu-an-da ÁõßŚģČťĀĒ),Pu-long-di ,Tan-san-niy-ya , nuamisan nu belaw Nan-su-dan , Cung-fay-cong-he-cow , nusatipan a kenis tuKang-kow-kung-he-kow , nutimulan a kenis u An-ke-la ,San-piy-ya Kang-ko-he a sauwac, namakay nuwalian pasayza satipan malikit i mahamin nu kanatal, nuzuma izaw ku U-pan-ci a sauwac, Lu-a-la-pa a sauwac u kahenulan nu likit nu sauwac, nuwalian a lilis nu kenis namakay amis pasayza i nutimulan izaw ku Ay-bu-te a taku,Ay-de-hua a taku,Ci-u a taku,Tan-kan-i-ke a taku atu Mu-uay-lu a takuan. Democratic Republic of the Congo a kakitizaan i teban nu Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) nu kanatal , i tiza i Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) balicu' nu teleklalan a kakitizaan, tabaki ku lala', tabaki ku lala' aazihan tu aatupan, Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) uyni dada' A-el-ci-li-ya u sakatusa tabakiay a kanatal, mahamin a kanatal pulung nu hekal a lala' 2 344,858 Ping-bang-kung-li nuwamisan a balaw u Cung-bey-kung-he-ko , nuwalian nuamisan atu Nan-su-dan matatules ku lala', nuwalian a balaw u Dung-bey-kung-he-kow masaapilis ku ilabu ku diheb, talulung ku nanaum salungan azihen atu U-kan-da Tan-san-ni-ya Luanda (Lu-an-da ÁõßŚģČťĀĒ) atu pulung-di matatulas, nutimulan atu An-ke-la matatules mababelaw nuwalian nutimulan San-pi-ya , satipan kenis nu Kang-ko , satipan nutimulan i salikit a sauwac Kang-ko-he , i salikit kalimucu' Ta-si-yang , dadipsan 37 Kung-li katanayu' dada'. 2001 a mihcaan cacay a bulad sabaw pitu a demiad, Lo-lang-de-si-lay-ka-pi-la mapatasasa nu saba a sakakaay nu hitay mapacuk mapatay tu ci La-sen-di-mi-ze-le (Rashidi Mizele), u wawa nu Ye-se-fu-ka-la-pi taluma i kanatal mala Cung-tung , mikawaw katukuh i 2019 a mihcaan 1 a bulad 24 a demiad. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 2001ŚĻī1śúą18śó•,śīõśúó-Śĺ∑Ť•Ņťõ∑¬∑ ¬∑ÁĪ≥śĺ§Śčí(Rashidi Mizele)ŚąļśģļŤļęšļ°,ŚÖ∂Ś≠źÁīĄÁĎüŚ§ę¬∑ 2019ŚĻī1śúą24śó•.) 2006 a mihcan 7 abulad 30 a demiad, Congo 'kim mikawaw ku Kung-tung atu Ko-mi-iy-huay amisingkiw, 8 a bulad 20 a demiad, misaketeday misingkiw ku Uay-yuan-huay sakamusa,pasingkiwan tu Kung-tung nayay ku pakaalaay tu 50% kaipapaw a paya, ci Ye-se-fu-ca-pi-la atu Zang-pi-i-rlben-pa misingkiw aca tu sakatusa apisingkiw 10 a bulad 29 a deniad, sakatusa makakutay misingkiw tu a a Kung-tung 11 a bulad 15 a demiad, misatekeday misingkiway a uay-uang sakamusa, ci Ka-pi-rl ku masingkiway a Kung-tung ,12 a bulad 30 a demiad, ci An-tuo-ban-ci-can-cia mala u Cung-li . makay 1980 a mihcaan a tepan nu ciday hausa, Congo a Á§¶ÁĒĘ nulaculan mawada tu, kanahatu i 1960ŚĻī namisateket tulin i Nan-bey hausa Africa (Fey-zhou ťĚěśī≤) a sakatusa ku kikay kusi nu kanatal, nika satabaki satu uyni kasakalamkam a malahat u mikimmay atu miba'tuay atu malukay u niu kange'luan kaizaw, saayaway atu sakatusa pingangayaw nu Congo atu1996ŚĻī mmalinga'tu tu macacukah, tabaki satu kini sakalawacu' nu Congo a tademaw nu kanatal nisangaan a aca atu caysan nu kanatal nu micumuday, a pabelinen ku suku nu kanatal micunus tu ku talakaw, tu ku nu nutawan a kinapinanay tu a ngangayaw, mapatay tu 500 a man kakatuud nu mapatayay a tademaw, malilit tu a makunga'lay atu imelang uynian a kanatal, pakala tu tulu a tusa ku tademaw caay ka kapah ku uzip. ŚČõśěúśįĎšłĽŚÖĪ u malukay a kanatal, malahadÁôľŚĪē tu nikalukan, u lalabu nu kanatal masenged sidamek tu lala' mahini u nikalukan atuud yadah satu, hatu i kakuti'ay paluma', u ngannganan nu nipalumaan u a zung-gu-su a kilang, misangatu zung-gu a simal u kahenulan kuni , uyza satu nipalunaan nu kuhi ke-ke ,sanasay ,kupa ,papah nu katasaku ,tipus ,lami' , padingad , kubkub , tebus , kalitang ,galasu , paza' atu uza amin. tutuc tu 2016 a mihcaanŚĻī pulung nisulitan a tademaw Democratic Republic of the Congo i lalabu nu kanatal pulung izaw ku 254ŚÄč ku ni kasaniyazu' nu binacadan, Bantu a kamu a kamuan musakamuay tuynian a kamu pakala tu pulung 84ÔľÖ ku tademaw, Congo a binacadan, Nen-ciy-la a binacadan , Lu-pa a minacadan , Men-ke-en-ku-en-tu a men-ke-en-du a minacadan , Lung-da a binacadan , Su-ku a binacadan amin, u liwan satu u kamu Su-dan a kamu A-can-de a binacadan atu Ni-lu-de a kamu A-lu-rl a binacadan atu Pa ke-mi a banacadan amin, kamu nu kanatal u Fa a kamu , angangan a kamu izaw ku Lin-ciy-la a kamu Ci-kang-ku a kamu Ci-lu-pa a kamu atu Se-wa-si-li a kamu , u binawlan 55ÔľÖ ku u Tin-si-kiw,35ÔľÖ u baluhay a singku, nu zumaay pulung 10ÔľÖ.
